facts.claim: MS Nautica is a cruise ship built for Renaissance Cruises as part of their R class.
As part of their Regatta Class, Nautica is now owned and operated by Oceania Cruises.
She was built in 2000 by the Chantiers de l'Atlantique shipyard in Saint-Nazaire, France, for Renaissance Cruises as MS R Five.
She sailed for Pullmantur Cruises between 2002 and 2004 before entering service with her current owners in 2005.
